fullText:
La Mina is a steel roller coaster located at Parque de Atracciones de Zaragoza in Zaragoza, Zaragoza, Aragon, Spain. It is a Zamperla Family Gravity Coaster 80STD.

"La Mina" means "The Mine" in Spanish.

La Mina is located in a small western-themed section of the park.

The trains are painted mimicking a mine train and have the words "ACME" written on red letters.
